data.title: Top Holders Of Quantum Computing Stocks In Q4: BlackRock, Vanguard, UBS, State Street Pour Money In Rigetti, D-Wave, IonQ, QUBT
data.description: We look at the top five holders of quantum computing companies according to the Security Exchange Commission's 13F filings.

data.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Reportedly Meets Trump As Tariff Impact Looms On iPhone Sales And Company's China Strategy
data.description: Amid escalating trade tensions between the US and China, Apple Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) CEO Tim Cook is said to have met President Donald Trump.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Sells $116M Shares Of Dialysis Giant DaVita, Cuts Stake By 2%
data.description: Warren Buffett's investment firm, Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK.A) (NYSE: BRK.B), has offloaded a 2% stake in dialysis service provider, DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA). The transaction, executed between February 14 and 19, is valued at around $116 million.

data.title: Walmart Expands AI Use Beyond Optimizing Delivery Routes, To Tackling Inventory Issues And Delivering Code Faster
data.description: Walmart highlighted a surge in its AI use cases to manage its inventory, supply chain, deliveries, and developer efficiency in Q4.

data.title: Amazon Attracts $119 Million Investment From Activist Hedge Fund ValueAct: Analysts See 25% Upside — What Catalysts Drive Jeff Bezos' E-Commerce Giant?
data.description: ValueAct Holdings, L.P. has initiated a significant position in Amazon.com Inc., purchasing 536,900 shares worth approximately $122 million during the fourth quarter of 2024, according to a13F filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission on Feb. 14.
